summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Studyflash internal support platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration tests successful with all core features functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and all 18 endpoints (100% success rate)
Login page loads with Sign In/Register tabs
Dashboard shows stats cards (Total:13, Open:7, In Progress:3, Resolved:2, Unassigned:4)
Dashboard displays charts (By Category, By Priority, Team Workload) and recent tickets
Tickets page shows all tickets with working filters (status, category, priority)
Ticket detail page loads with conversation, AI actions, properties sidebar
AI action buttons (Categorize, Draft Reply, Translate, Auto-Assign) all functional
Reply textarea and send button work - messages appear in thread
Ticket status/priority/assignee/category selects work and update ticket
Team page shows all 6 team members with avatars, names, emails, roles
Sidebar navigation between Dashboard, Tickets, Team works perfectly
Enrichment tabs (User, Sentry, PostHog) display mock data correctly
User menu and logout functionality working
Multilingual support visible (German, Dutch, English tickets)
Outlook sync simulation working (thread IDs displayed)
AI endpoints respond correctly with GPT-5.2 integration
